Back to search

Tender number RFT0661

Awarded

Darwin - Subscription to a Cybersecurity Risk Platform for a Period of 36 Months

Power and Water Corporation are seeking to purchase a software-as-a-service (SaaS) subscription to a cybersecurity risk platform that supports Power and Water to uplift its cybersecurity posture and third-party risk management to meet regulated requirements.

Power and Water are looking acquire and implement a platform providing: 

(1)    third‑party risk management (TPRM) with automated questionnaires, evidence collection and continuous monitoring.

(2)     external attack surface management (EASM) for continuous discovery of internet‑facing assets and exposures; and 

(3)    governance dashboards and audit‑ready reporting to support ongoing risk treatment and annual attestations

Please refer to RFT documents for full description.

Category:

Information Technology

Procurement method:

Public

CAL accreditation required

No

Technical enquiries

Call 08 8924 5025 (if outside Australia call +61 8 8924 5025)

Region of works

The works will be conducted in the following region(s):

  • Darwin, Palmerston, Litchfield

Request For Tender

Release

30/03/2026

Close

15/04/2026

Award

18/05/2026

Lodgement details

Electronic lodgement using the eLodgement facility

Faxing to Darwin tenders office on +61 8 8999 1935

The following documents will need to be provided:

  • No additional documents are required

Listed by

Power and Water Corporation

GPO Box 1921, Darwin NT 0801

For further enquiries, please contact the Darwin Procurement Office

Period contract - estimated unit rates of $446,425.94
